info.name: CarCarePlus API
info.description:
Auth, registration and super-admin approval endpoints for CarCarePlus.

Set the `base_url` variable (default http://localhost:8000). The Login / Register Customer requests automatically save the returned Sanctum token into the `token` collection variable, which every authenticated request uses as a Bearer token.

request.description:
Personal customer self-registration. Active immediately and returns a token.

Note: `image_url` is an optional image upload (jpg/jpeg/png/webp, max 2MB) — use form-data if you want to send it.

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Company Owner",
    "email": "company@example.com",
    "phone": "0500000002",
    "password": "password123",
    "password_confirmation": "password123",
    "is_active": false,
    "company_name": "Acme Auto",
    "company_name_ar": "أكمي أوتو",
    "commercial_reg": "CR-123456",
    "tax_number": "TAX-123456",
    "company_address": "123 King Fahd Rd, Riyadh"
}

request.description: Company customer submits a registration request. Pending super-admin approval (no token issued).

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Workshop Owner",
    "email": "workshop@example.com",
    "phone": "0500000003",
    "password": "password123",
    "password_confirmation": "password123",
    "is_active": false,
    "workshop_name": "Speedy Garage",
    "workshop_name_ar": "الكراج السريع",
    "workshop_address": "45 Olaya St, Riyadh",
    "workshop_city": "Riyadh",
    "latitude": 24.7136,
    "longitude": 46.6753
}

request.description: Workshop submits a registration request. Pending super-admin approval (no token issued).
Log in and receive a Sanctum token. The token is saved to the `token` collection variable automatically.

response.name: error workshop The provided credentials are incorrect.

request.description: Revoke the current access token. Requires auth:sanctum.
Return the currently authenticated user. Requires auth:sanctum.
Send a password reset link by email. Always responds generically to prevent account enumeration.
Set a new password using the token from the reset email.
Email a one-time reset code. Responds generically to prevent account enumeration.
Set a new password using the emailed OTP code.
Change the password for the authenticated user. Requires auth:sanctum.

item.name: Admin (Super Admin)

request.description: Super admin creates an employee. `type` is one of: washer, mechanic.
Super admin creates a branch admin account.

item.description: All endpoints require auth:sanctum and the super_admin role.
